seo.title: Esthetician Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your esthetics practice. Route unhappy clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Estheticians
hero.subheading: Glow is personal. ReviewFlo helps you ask after facials when skin looks its calmest.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Esthetician Faces

items.heading: Great skin looks “normal” to clients
items.body: They forget how irritated they felt last month.

items.heading: Breakouts after treatments spark fear posts
items.body: Purge weeks feel like your fault online.

items.heading: Rooms are quiet and time is tight
items.body: Retail upsell already feels delicate. Reviews rarely get mentioned.

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Private first for reactions
items.body: Redness and allergies deserve a direct line.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Can we ask without promising results?
items.a: Yes. Focus asks on care, cleanliness, and education.

items.q: What if a peel goes wrong?
items.a: Private feedback lets you triage before public panic.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing at pricing meant for suite renters.
Reviews should reflect service, not a SKU.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Esthetician Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
